meta.title: The Bigger Threat to U.S. National Security—Iran or Non-Stat
meta.description: On August 14th, Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Lee Smith moderated an expert panel featuring Michael Doran, Hillel Fradkin, and Brian Katulis that discussed whether non-state Sunni extremism or Iran constitutes the major strategic threat to American interests in the region. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
